description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 34 hrs 23 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 37 mins. His WakaTime breakdown was Java at 39%, Other at 37%, and Markdown at 15%, across 6 projects. He had no recorded GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories.
